message:
feat(lib): define public API with crate-level lint configuration

This commit adds the library root file that defines the public API
surface, configures crate-level lints, and re-exports commonly used
types for ergonomic library usage.

src/lib.rs - Library Root:

Module Declarations:
- pub mod ansi: ANSI escape sequence generation
- pub mod buffer: OptimizedBuffer and drawing operations
- pub mod cell: Cell and CellContent types
- pub mod color: Rgba color with blending
- pub mod error: Error types and Result alias
- pub mod event: Event callbacks and logging
- pub mod highlight: Syntax highlighting infrastructure
- pub mod input: Input event parsing
- pub mod link: Hyperlink pool (OSC 8)
- pub mod renderer: Double-buffered renderer
- pub mod style: Style and TextAttributes
- pub mod terminal: Terminal abstraction
- pub mod text: Text editing system
- pub mod unicode: Grapheme and width utilities

Crate-Level Lint Configuration:
- #![warn(unsafe_code)]: Unsafe needs justification (termios FFI)
- #![allow(dead_code)]: Public API functions not yet used internally
- #![allow(clippy::cast_possible_truncation)]: Intentional coordinates
- #![allow(clippy::cast_sign_loss)]: Coordinate conversions
- #![allow(clippy::cast_precision_loss)]: Color math
- #![allow(clippy::cast_possible_wrap)]: Signed coordinates
- #![allow(clippy::module_name_repetitions)]: Cell::CellContent OK
- #![allow(clippy::struct_excessive_bools)]: Terminal state flags
- #![allow(clippy::missing_errors_doc)]: Docs WIP
- #![allow(clippy::missing_panics_doc)]: Docs WIP
- Additional allows for style preferences and clarity

Re-exports at Crate Root:

Core Types:
- pub use cell::{Cell, CellContent}
- pub use color::Rgba
- pub use error::{Error, Result}
- pub use style::{Style, TextAttributes}
- pub use link::LinkPool

Event System:
- pub use event::{LogLevel, emit_event, emit_log, ...}

Input Types:
- pub use input::{Event, InputParser, KeyCode, KeyEvent, ...}

ANSI Types:
- pub use ansi::ColorMode

Buffer:
- pub use buffer::OptimizedBuffer

Renderer:
- pub use renderer::{RenderStats, Renderer, RendererOptions}

Terminal:
- pub use terminal::{RawModeGuard, Terminal, enable_raw_mode, ...}

Text Editing:
- pub use text::{EditBuffer, EditorView, TextBuffer, ...}

Unicode:
- pub use unicode::{WidthMethod, set_width_method}

API Design Philosophy:
- Most commonly used types at crate root
- Full modules available for advanced usage
- No prelude (explicit imports preferred)
- Zero framework opinions (rendering engine only)

Usage Example:
  use opentui::{Renderer, OptimizedBuffer, Style, Rgba, Cell};

  let mut renderer = Renderer::new(80, 24)?;
  let buffer = renderer.buffer();
  buffer.clear(Rgba::BLACK);
  buffer.draw_text(10, 5, "Hello", Style::fg(Rgba::GREEN));
  renderer.present()?;

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
